incidents.title: Investigating - Storage availability degraded - East US 2
incidents.description: Customers attempting to access Storage accounts in East US 2 may experience increased latency or timeouts. Engineers are investigating. Demo fixture for the Phase E azure-status scenario.

incidents.title: Mitigating - Azure SQL Database connectivity - West Europe
incidents.description: A subset of customers using Azure SQL Database in West Europe may have experienced connection failures. We have identified the cause and are mitigating.
